---
title: "Prerna Tyagi"
subtitle: "Applied AI/ML engineering — from-scratch implementations and experiments"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
  feed: true
  categories: true
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

A series on what's inside the building blocks of modern AI products — embeddings, retrieval, evals, agents, fine-tuning — implemented from scratch and measured on real corpora. Each post is paired with a companion notebook in [ml-applied-depth](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/ml-applied-depth).

Inspired by [Tanul Singh's gradient-descent-through-transformers series](https://tanulsingh.github.io/blog).
